description_long: This is a low-poly, olive green backpack with a geometric, angular design and a minimalist aesthetic. The main body is a single, faceted compartment with a flat top and a prominent vertical brown strap running down the center of the front, secured by a small black buckle. Two large, rectangular side pockets are attached symmetrically, each with a flap closure, and the front lower section features an additional pocket with a subtle seam. The back of the backpack is equipped with two wide, flat shoulder straps that are rigid and angular, extending downward and outward from the top. The surface finish is matte, with no visible logos, patterns, or decorative elements, giving it a utilitarian and modern appearance.
description: A low-poly, olive green backpack with angular shapes, a central brown strap, and two wide, flat shoulder straps. It features large side pockets and a minimalist, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main compartment, central brown strap with black buckle, and the front pocket seam.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the angular side pocket and the flat, geometric shoulder strap extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the two wide, flat shoulder straps and the plain, faceted back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the right side pocket and the angular strap design.
attribute_strap_design: Two wide, flat, angular shoulder straps with no visible padding or adjustability; no chest or waist straps.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One main compartment, two large external side pockets with flaps, and one front lower pocket with a flap.
